serviceDescription: Amazon AppStream 2.0 is a fully managed service that provides secure, reliable, and scalable access to applications and non-persistent desktops from any location.

cards.title: Service Settings
cards.helpText: Click following link to learn more Always-On, On-Demand, and Elastic fleet instances on the Amazon AppStream 2.0 pricing page.

components.label: Buffer capacity as % of concurrency
components.description: Specify the percent of concurrency to maintain as buffer capacity. Buffer capacity ensures new users have an instance available.
